headline: Full P&L and balance sheet for CBA's $1bn+ insurer. Motor profitable within 15 months.
evidence: Full P&L and balance sheet accountability for CBA's $1bn+ insurer. Combined ratio 101.5% to 89.2%. Motor profitable within 15 months (never previously profitable). Reinsurance placed up to $1.9bn. Divestment with joint strategy and funded roadmap. Portfolio growth $115m to $200m at Westpac.
